extraction_method: Ghidra 12.1.2 headless disassembly, ExtractVocab.java v2 (dual-pattern token extraction + shape filter + stoplist)
confidence: medium - tokens are real (confirmed present as registered command/param strings), but grouping into commands vs. params vs. conditionals below is a best-effort guess from naming convention, NOT verified by tracing each function's actual cmdcond/params structure the way control4_agent_scheduler.json was. Treat the flat token list as ground truth; treat the grouping as a hypothesis to verify.
notes: Media-type constants (RF_*, DIGITAL_*, BT_*, *_AUDIO), OpenSSL/logging noise, PROXY_NAME, and DIR_ADD/DIR_LOAD/LIST_ADD are CONFIRMED identical across access/announcements/audioscenes -- added to ExtractVocab.java's STOPLIST so future extractions skip them automatically. (Correction: an earlier version of this file wrongly claimed LIST_ADD was audioscenes-specific based on an incomplete manual read of the batch output -- it is not, it's generic.)
